item.title: Add 'Open in new tab' to session context menu — right-click sessions to open in new browser tab via hash routing for side-by-side comparison (93 tests pass)
item.description: Add 'Open in new tab' to session context menu — right-click sessions to open in new browser tab via hash routing for side-by-side comparison (93 tests pass)

item.title: Add character count indicator to message input — shows char count while typing, gold highlight at 500+ chars (WebSocket threshold), compact 2.5k format for 1000+ chars (92 tests pass)
item.description: Add character count indicator to message input — shows char count while typing, gold highlight at 500+ chars (WebSocket threshold), compact 2.5k format for 1000+ chars (92 tests pass)

item.title: Add desktop notifications when assistant finishes while tab is in background — Notification API with permission request on first send, working->idle transition trigger, command palette toggle, localStorage persistence (91 tests pass)
item.description: Add desktop notifications when assistant finishes while tab is in background — Notification API with permission request on first send, working->idle transition trigger, command palette toggle, localStorage persistence (91 tests pass)

item.title: Add copy button to tool result output — hover reveals Copy button (top-right) on tool result pre blocks, copies raw output to clipboard with Copied\! feedback; mobile: always-visible at 0.6 opacity (90 tests pass)
item.description: Add copy button to tool result output — hover reveals Copy button (top-right) on tool result pre blocks, copies raw output to clipboard with Copied\! feedback; mobile: always-visible at 0.6 opacity (90 tests pass)

item.title: Add recent sessions quick-access cards to empty state — shows top 3 non-autoweb sessions with title, time, and message count for fast navigation when no session is selected (89 tests pass)
item.description: Add recent sessions quick-access cards to empty state — shows top 3 non-autoweb sessions with title, time, and message count for fast navigation when no session is selected (89 tests pass)

item.title: Add session right-click context menu — star/unstar, copy session ID, export Markdown, mark as read; positioned at cursor, closes on click-outside/Escape (88 tests pass)
item.description: Add session right-click context menu — star/unstar, copy session ID, export Markdown, mark as read; positioned at cursor, closes on click-outside/Escape (88 tests pass)

item.title: Sticky date separators in message list — date headers (Today/Yesterday/Mar 15) pin to top when scrolling long sessions like Slack/WhatsApp, with pill-shaped label and solid background (87 tests pass)
item.description: Sticky date separators in message list — date headers (Today/Yesterday/Mar 15) pin to top when scrolling long sessions like Slack/WhatsApp, with pill-shaped label and solid background (87 tests pass)

item.title: Add export session as Markdown — command palette entry (Ctrl+K > Export) fetches all messages, formats as Markdown with user/assistant headings and tool call blocks, triggers .md file download (86 tests pass)
item.description: Add export session as Markdown — command palette entry (Ctrl+K > Export) fetches all messages, formats as Markdown with user/assistant headings and tool call blocks, triggers .md file download (86 tests pass)

item.title: Add tool call duration display — shows elapsed time (1.2s/5s/1m 23s) on tool result headers during live SSE streaming, hidden for batch history loads (84 tests pass)
item.description: Add tool call duration display — shows elapsed time (1.2s/5s/1m 23s) on tool result headers during live SSE streaming, hidden for batch history loads (84 tests pass)

item.title: Add pulsing gold running dot on tool call headers — dot appears when tool_use is rendered, auto-removed when tool_result arrives via tool_use_id matching, cleared on history load (83 tests pass)
item.description: Add pulsing gold running dot on tool call headers — dot appears when tool_use is rendered, auto-removed when tool_result arrives via tool_use_id matching, cleared on history load (83 tests pass)

item.title: Shorten file paths in tool call headers — shortenFilePath() strips /home/*/... prefixes to show meaningful tail (src/main.rs instead of /home/feather-dev/feather-dev/src/main.rs) in Read/Write/Edit/Grep previews (82 tests pass)
item.description: Shorten file paths in tool call headers — shortenFilePath() strips /home/*/... prefixes to show meaningful tail (src/main.rs instead of /home/feather-dev/feather-dev/src/main.rs) in Read/Write/Edit/Grep previews (82 tests pass)

item.title: Add file language badges (Rust, JS, Python, etc.) to Read/Write/Edit/Grep/Glob tool call headers — colored pill badges based on file extension for quick scanning (81 tests pass)
item.description: Add file language badges (Rust, JS, Python, etc.) to Read/Write/Edit/Grep/Glob tool call headers — colored pill badges based on file extension for quick scanning (81 tests pass)

item.title: Thinking block collapsed preview — shows first 80 chars of thinking text + word count when collapsed, hidden when expanded; CSS + JS change with new test (80 tests pass)
item.description: Thinking block collapsed preview — shows first 80 chars of thinking text + word count when collapsed, hidden when expanded; CSS + JS change with new test (80 tests pass)

item.title: Server-side pagination: backend 'before' param for reverse pagination + frontend limit=200 initial load, load-earlier fetches 50-message chunks from server (79 tests pass)
item.description: Server-side pagination: backend 'before' param for reverse pagination + frontend limit=200 initial load, load-earlier fetches 50-message chunks from server (79 tests pass)

item.title: Fix SSE reconnect race condition — added tailReconnectTimer guard so onerror/heartbeat timeout cannot spawn overlapping reconnection attempts (MEDIUM priority from known issues)
item.description: Fix SSE reconnect race condition — added tailReconnectTimer guard so onerror/heartbeat timeout cannot spawn overlapping reconnection attempts (MEDIUM priority from known issues)

item.title: Add session ID validation to API endpoints — is_valid_session_id() rejects path traversal and malformed IDs in 6 handlers (Phil priority: reject malformed IDs early)
item.description: Add session ID validation to API endpoints — is_valid_session_id() rejects path traversal and malformed IDs in 6 handlers (Phil priority: reject malformed IDs early)

item.title: Add auto-scroll reliability — capture-phase image/video/iframe load handler on #messages re-scrolls when media loads and user is at bottom, plus double-rAF in scrollToBottom for layout-shift correction (Phil: auto-scroll reliability fixes)
item.description: Add auto-scroll reliability — capture-phase image/video/iframe load handler on #messages re-scrolls when media loads and user is at bottom, plus double-rAF in scrollToBottom for layout-shift correction (Phil: auto-scroll reliability fixes)

item.title: Add Ctrl+B (Cmd+B) keyboard shortcut to toggle sidebar — standard IDE shortcut, added to keydown handler, command palette (shows shortcut badge), and shortcuts help modal (75 tests pass)
item.description: Add Ctrl+B (Cmd+B) keyboard shortcut to toggle sidebar — standard IDE shortcut, added to keydown handler, command palette (shows shortcut badge), and shortcuts help modal (75 tests pass)

item.title: Add session timestamp auto-refresh — sidebar relative times (now/5m/2h) update every 30s via data-last-updated attribute, so timestamps stay accurate without full re-render
item.description: Add session timestamp auto-refresh — sidebar relative times (now/5m/2h) update every 30s via data-last-updated attribute, so timestamps stay accurate without full re-render

item.title: Add full timestamp tooltip to session sidebar times — hovering relative time (now/6m/2h) shows full date-time in ET (formatFullTime helper), 73 tests pass
item.description: Add full timestamp tooltip to session sidebar times — hovering relative time (now/6m/2h) shows full date-time in ET (formatFullTime helper), 73 tests pass

item.title: Add SSE heartbeat timeout (60s) for zombie connection detection — forces reconnect when no SSE data arrives, preventing silent disconnections from going unnoticed (Phil: harden SSE reliability)
item.description: Add SSE heartbeat timeout (60s) for zombie connection detection — forces reconnect when no SSE data arrives, preventing silent disconnections from going unnoticed (Phil: harden SSE reliability)

item.title: Show Bash tool description in collapsed header preview — displays human-readable description (e.g. 'Build Rust binary') instead of raw command in tool call headers when description field is available
item.description: Show Bash tool description in collapsed header preview — displays human-readable description (e.g. 'Build Rust binary') instead of raw command in tool call headers when description field is available

item.title: Add Alt+Up/Down keyboard shortcuts to switch between sessions — wraps around, shown in shortcuts modal and command palette (70 tests pass)
item.description: Add Alt+Up/Down keyboard shortcuts to switch between sessions — wraps around, shown in shortcuts modal and command palette (70 tests pass)

item.title: Fix command palette filter commands — was using non-existent sessionFilter/applySessionFilter(), now correctly calls setSessionFilter(); also added Toggle theme command to palette
item.description: Fix command palette filter commands — was using non-existent sessionFilter/applySessionFilter(), now correctly calls setSessionFilter(); also added Toggle theme command to palette

item.title: Fix What's New badge timestamp comparison — badge now shows dot when newest change is newer than last-seen instead of only when never viewed, with lightweight page-load check via checkWhatsNewBadge()
item.description: Fix What's New badge timestamp comparison — badge now shows dot when newest change is newer than last-seen instead of only when never viewed, with lightweight page-load check via checkWhatsNewBadge()

item.title: Add clear (X) button to session search input — hidden by default, appears when search has text, clears input and refocuses on click; also shows/hides keyboard shortcut hint accordingly
item.description: Add clear (X) button to session search input — hidden by default, appears when search has text, clears input and refocuses on click; also shows/hides keyboard shortcut hint accordingly

item.title: Remove all bare .unwrap() calls from Rust handlers — added epoch_secs/epoch_millis helpers, replaced 18 unwrap() with expect/unwrap_or_default (Phil priority: panic-proof error handling)
item.description: Remove all bare .unwrap() calls from Rust handlers — added epoch_secs/epoch_millis helpers, replaced 18 unwrap() with expect/unwrap_or_default (Phil priority: panic-proof error handling)

item.title: Add unread message count (N) prefix to browser tab title — users can see new activity from other tabs, synced with existing unread badge via incrementUnread/resetUnread calling updatePageTitle
item.description: Add unread message count (N) prefix to browser tab title — users can see new activity from other tabs, synced with existing unread badge via incrementUnread/resetUnread calling updatePageTitle

item.title: Add What's New changelog popover — 'New' button in header opens scrollable popover showing 15 most recent kept improvements with timestamps, click-outside close, localStorage tracking (from Phil's feature list)
item.description: Add What's New changelog popover — 'New' button in header opens scrollable popover showing 15 most recent kept improvements with timestamps, click-outside close, localStorage tracking (from Phil's feature list)

item.title: Add session starring — star/pin button on sidebar sessions, starred sort to top with Starred group header, localStorage-backed, command palette integration
item.description: Add session starring — star/pin button on sidebar sessions, starred sort to top with Starred group header, localStorage-backed, command palette integration

item.title: Add unread session indicators — gold dot on sidebar sessions with new activity since last viewed, tracked via sessionViewTimes in localStorage (from Phil's feature list)
item.description: Add unread session indicators — gold dot on sidebar sessions with new activity since last viewed, tracked via sessionViewTimes in localStorage (from Phil's feature list)

item.title: Add command palette (Ctrl+K) — searchable action launcher with 13 commands, arrow key navigation, Enter to execute, Escape to close; replaces old focus-input shortcut
item.description: Add command palette (Ctrl+K) — searchable action launcher with 13 commands, arrow key navigation, Enter to execute, Escape to close; replaces old focus-input shortcut

item.title: Fix SSE exponential backoff bug — moved tailReconnectDelay to module scope so backoff persists across reconnection attempts instead of resetting to 1s each time
item.description: Fix SSE exponential backoff bug — moved tailReconnectDelay to module scope so backoff persists across reconnection attempts instead of resetting to 1s each time

item.title: Add copy buttons to user messages — hover reveals Copy button (top-right) on user bubbles with data-raw-content for clipboard, mobile always-visible at 0.6 opacity, matching assistant message behavior
item.description: Add copy buttons to user messages — hover reveals Copy button (top-right) on user bubbles with data-raw-content for clipboard, mobile always-visible at 0.6 opacity, matching assistant message behavior

item.title: Add rotating fun status phrases (25 phrases like Scampering, Razmatazzing, Beboppin) — replaces hardcoded 'Ready, spaghetti' with readyStatus() that picks a random phrase each time (fixes HIGH status text issue)
item.description: Add rotating fun status phrases (25 phrases like Scampering, Razmatazzing, Beboppin) — replaces hardcoded 'Ready, spaghetti' with readyStatus() that picks a random phrase each time (fixes HIGH status text issue)

item.title: Fix iOS Safari viewport height — added -webkit-fill-available and 100dvh progressive enhancement, fixed test-session-filter-toggle to use is_autoweb instead of removed AUTOWEB_PATTERN
item.description: Fix iOS Safari viewport height — added -webkit-fill-available and 100dvh progressive enhancement, fixed test-session-filter-toggle to use is_autoweb instead of removed AUTOWEB_PATTERN

item.title: Collapsible user messages — long prompts (>300 chars or >8 lines) auto-collapse with Show more/less toggle, gradient fade, accent-colored link; applied to addUserMessage and addUserMessageWithImages
item.description: Collapsible user messages — long prompts (>300 chars or >8 lines) auto-collapse with Show more/less toggle, gradient fade, accent-colored link; applied to addUserMessage and addUserMessageWithImages

item.title: Dynamic favicon and title showing session status — green F icon when idle, gold when working (Thinking/Running tool), red when disconnected; browser tab shows session name and status prefix (no test — visual only)
item.description: Dynamic favicon and title showing session status — green F icon when idle, gold when working (Thinking/Running tool), red when disconnected; browser tab shows session name and status prefix (no test — visual only)

item.title: URL linkification in user messages — bare https:// URLs now rendered as clickable accent-colored links (target=_blank), applied across all 5 user message rendering paths
item.description: URL linkification in user messages — bare https:// URLs now rendered as clickable accent-colored links (target=_blank), applied across all 5 user message rendering paths

item.title: Add in-chat message search (Ctrl+F) — search bar with gold-highlighted matches, 1/N counter, Enter/Shift+Enter prev/next navigation, Escape to close, added to keyboard shortcuts modal
item.description: Add in-chat message search (Ctrl+F) — search bar with gold-highlighted matches, 1/N counter, Enter/Shift+Enter prev/next navigation, Escape to close, added to keyboard shortcuts modal

item.title: Add session keyboard navigation — ArrowUp/ArrowDown highlights sessions in sidebar search, Enter selects; blue highlight style, blur clears, documented in shortcuts modal
item.description: Add session keyboard navigation — ArrowUp/ArrowDown highlights sessions in sidebar search, Enter selects; blue highlight style, blur clears, documented in shortcuts modal

item.title: Restore Ctrl+N (Cmd+N) keyboard shortcut for new Pi session (lost in prior edits) + add to shortcuts help modal
item.description: Restore Ctrl+N (Cmd+N) keyboard shortcut for new Pi session (lost in prior edits) + add to shortcuts help modal

item.title: Add message_count to Session API response and display in sidebar session list — users can now see message counts (e.g. 148 msg) next to relative time for each session
item.description: Add message_count to Session API response and display in sidebar session list — users can now see message counts (e.g. 148 msg) next to relative time for each session

item.title: Search highlight in session filter — matching substring in titles gets gold highlight (.search-highlight) when filtering sessions, also fixed title XSS by escaping non-search titles
item.description: Search highlight in session filter — matching substring in titles gets gold highlight (.search-highlight) when filtering sessions, also fixed title XSS by escaping non-search titles

item.title: Fix markdown links to open in new tab (target=_blank rel=noopener) — prevents navigating away from Feather when clicking links in messages
item.description: Fix markdown links to open in new tab (target=_blank rel=noopener) — prevents navigating away from Feather when clicking links in messages

item.title: Removed 4 AUTOWEB regex patterns (CRITICAL #5) — isAutowebSession now uses server-side is_autoweb flag with minimal 2-line fallback, deleted ~20 lines of fragile NLP/regex matching
item.description: Removed 4 AUTOWEB regex patterns (CRITICAL #5) — isAutowebSession now uses server-side is_autoweb flag with minimal 2-line fallback, deleted ~20 lines of fragile NLP/regex matching

item.title: Added collapse/expand all tool calls toggle button (wrench icon) in input toolbar — collapses/expands all tool-call and tool-result bodies at once, with per-session state and auto-show/hide based on tool presence
item.description: Added collapse/expand all tool calls toggle button (wrench icon) in input toolbar — collapses/expands all tool-call and tool-result bodies at once, with per-session state and auto-show/hide based on tool presence

item.title: Add date separator dividers (Today/Yesterday/Mon Mar 15) between messages from different days — improves navigation in long multi-day sessions, handles load-earlier dedup
item.description: Add date separator dividers (Today/Yesterday/Mon Mar 15) between messages from different days — improves navigation in long multi-day sessions, handles load-earlier dedup

item.title: Replace plain Loading text with shimmer skeleton UI when switching sessions — shows conversation-shaped skeleton with animated shimmer gradient mimicking user/assistant/tool blocks
item.description: Replace plain Loading text with shimmer skeleton UI when switching sessions — shows conversation-shaped skeleton with animated shimmer gradient mimicking user/assistant/tool blocks

item.title: Added unread message count badge to scroll-to-bottom button — gold pill shows count of new messages while scrolled up, resets on scroll-to-bottom or session switch
item.description: Added unread message count badge to scroll-to-bottom button — gold pill shows count of new messages while scrolled up, resets on scroll-to-bottom or session switch

item.title: Add copy-message button to assistant bubbles — hover reveals Copy button (top-right) that copies raw markdown to clipboard, with Copied! feedback; mobile: always-visible at 0.6 opacity
item.description: Add copy-message button to assistant bubbles — hover reveals Copy button (top-right) that copies raw markdown to clipboard, with Copied! feedback; mobile: always-visible at 0.6 opacity

item.title: Add timestamps to assistant messages — subtle time display below each assistant bubble (left-aligned), only shown on last text block per turn; both initial history load and SSE tailing paths updated
item.description: Add timestamps to assistant messages — subtle time display below each assistant bubble (left-aligned), only shown on last text block per turn; both initial history load and SSE tailing paths updated

item.title: Strip ANSI escape codes from tool result output — adds stripAnsi() function to remove ESC[...m color codes from Bash/CLI tool results, fixing raw [32m/[0m text leaking into message display
item.description: Strip ANSI escape codes from tool result output — adds stripAnsi() function to remove ESC[...m color codes from Bash/CLI tool results, fixing raw [32m/[0m text leaking into message display

item.title: Add timestamps to user messages — subtle time display below each user bubble (today: '1:47 AM', older: 'Mar 15 3:30 PM') using ISO timestamps from backend data
item.description: Add timestamps to user messages — subtle time display below each user bubble (today: '1:47 AM', older: 'Mar 15 3:30 PM') using ISO timestamps from backend data

item.title: Add TodoWrite/AskUserQuestion/Skill tool rendering — checklist UI with status icons, question options display, and skill badges instead of raw JSON dump
item.description: Add TodoWrite/AskUserQuestion/Skill tool rendering — checklist UI with status icons, question options display, and skill badges instead of raw JSON dump

item.title: Compiled and deployed Rust binary with is_autoweb metadata flag and better session titles — 32/33 dev sessions correctly detected as autoweb
item.description: Compiled and deployed Rust binary with is_autoweb metadata flag and better session titles — 32/33 dev sessions correctly detected as autoweb

item.title: Better autoweb session titles: skip boilerplate prompts, use assistant first response as fallback title + is_autoweb metadata flag for filter detection (compile needed for full deploy)
item.description: Better autoweb session titles: skip boilerplate prompts, use assistant first response as fallback title + is_autoweb metadata flag for filter detection (compile needed for full deploy)

item.title: Fixed autoweb session filter — added 'hard N-minute timeout' and 'Do exactly ONE iteration' patterns to AUTOWEB_KEYWORD_PATTERN, fixing Mine/Auto classification (was Mine:30/Auto:1, now Mine:0/Auto:31)
item.description: Fixed autoweb session filter — added 'hard N-minute timeout' and 'Do exactly ONE iteration' patterns to AUTOWEB_KEYWORD_PATTERN, fixing Mine/Auto classification (was Mine:30/Auto:1, now Mine:0/Auto:31)

item.title: Fallback session titles — normalizer now extracts first user message (truncated to 60 chars, first line only) as title when no summary record exists; all 18 dev sessions now show titles instead of Untitled
item.description: Fallback session titles — normalizer now extracts first user message (truncated to 60 chars, first line only) as title when no summary record exists; all 18 dev sessions now show titles instead of Untitled

item.title: Add Reviews tab to AW dashboard — new /api/autoweb-reviews/{instance} endpoint serves review markdown files, Reviews tab renders them with marked.js using collapsible details/summary with instance badges and proper markdown styling
item.description: Add Reviews tab to AW dashboard — new /api/autoweb-reviews/{instance} endpoint serves review markdown files, Reviews tab renders them with marked.js using collapsible details/summary with instance badges and proper markdown styling

item.title: Chunked load-earlier messages — renders 50 at a time with scroll-position preservation instead of dumping all at once (fixes HIGH priority Safari/mobile crash on 1000+ message sessions)
item.description: Chunked load-earlier messages — renders 50 at a time with scroll-position preservation instead of dumping all at once (fixes HIGH priority Safari/mobile crash on 1000+ message sessions)

item.title: Add Ctrl+N (Cmd+N) keyboard shortcut to start a new Pi session — also added to keyboard shortcuts help modal (?)
item.description: Add Ctrl+N (Cmd+N) keyboard shortcut to start a new Pi session — also added to keyboard shortcuts help modal (?)

item.title: Paginated message loading: backend limit/total params + frontend loads last 50 messages initially with load-earlier button — prevents Safari/iPadOS crashes on large sessions (55%+ payload reduction)
item.description: Paginated message loading: backend limit/total params + frontend loads last 50 messages initially with load-earlier button — prevents Safari/iPadOS crashes on large sessions (55%+ payload reduction)

item.title: AW dashboard now aggregates all 3 autoweb instances (full-stack, frontend, trading) via /api/autoweb-results/{instance} endpoint — All tab merges and sorts chronologically with color-coded source badges
item.description: AW dashboard now aggregates all 3 autoweb instances (full-stack, frontend, trading) via /api/autoweb-results/{instance} endpoint — All tab merges and sorts chronologically with color-coded source badges

item.title: Fix duplicate user messages with image attachments: set data-content-hash and data-image-path on optimistic messages, strip [Attached image:] markers before optimistic matching
item.description: Fix duplicate user messages with image attachments: set data-content-hash and data-image-path on optimistic messages, strip [Attached image:] markers before optimistic matching

item.title: Add session fork endpoint: POST /api/claude-fork/{session_id} uses --resume --fork-session to branch from existing sessions
item.description: Add session fork endpoint: POST /api/claude-fork/{session_id} uses --resume --fork-session to branch from existing sessions

item.title: Fix tmux send-keys character limit: use load-buffer/paste-buffer for messages >= 500 bytes to bypass OS arg length limit
item.description: Fix tmux send-keys character limit: use load-buffer/paste-buffer for messages >= 500 bytes to bypass OS arg length limit

item.title: Clean up all 13 compiler warnings: remove dead code (SUPERVISOR_CONF, run_command_with_output), add #[allow(dead_code)] for future-use structs/methods, fix mut and unused var
item.description: Clean up all 13 compiler warnings: remove dead code (SUPERVISOR_CONF, run_command_with_output), add #[allow(dead_code)] for future-use structs/methods, fix mut and unused var

item.title: Improved weekly trend display — large ratios now show multiplier format (37x last wk) instead of noisy percentages (+3600% vs last wk)
item.description: Improved weekly trend display — large ratios now show multiplier format (37x last wk) instead of noisy percentages (+3600% vs last wk)

item.title: Improved autoweb session filter detection — added AUTOWEB_FIX_PATTERN and AUTOWEB_SPECIFIC_PATTERN to catch Mobile/Responsive/Layout fix sessions, Mine count dropped from 37 to 22 (Auto from 83 to 98)
item.description: Improved autoweb session filter detection — added AUTOWEB_FIX_PATTERN and AUTOWEB_SPECIFIC_PATTERN to catch Mobile/Responsive/Layout fix sessions, Mine count dropped from 37 to 22 (Auto from 83 to 98)

item.title: Expanded autoweb session filter pattern — added Timed/Time-Constrained/Time-Boxed/Automating prefixes and keyword-based matching (Experiment Loop, Iteration Loop, etc.) to catch 81/118 sessions vs ~65 before
item.description: Expanded autoweb session filter pattern — added Timed/Time-Constrained/Time-Boxed/Automating prefixes and keyword-based matching (Experiment Loop, Iteration Loop, etc.) to catch 81/118 sessions vs ~65 before

item.title: Mobile-friendly AW dashboard header — flex-wrap for wrapping on small screens, compact title, 32px close button touch target
item.description: Mobile-friendly AW dashboard header — flex-wrap for wrapping on small screens, compact title, 32px close button touch target

item.title: Added session counts to Mine/Auto/All filter pills — users can see at a glance how many sessions in each category
item.description: Added session counts to Mine/Auto/All filter pills — users can see at a glance how many sessions in each category

item.title: Hide version indicator on mobile (< 768px) to prevent overlap with Send button — cleaner mobile input area
item.description: Hide version indicator on mobile (< 768px) to prevent overlap with Send button — cleaner mobile input area

item.title: Contextual empty session list messages — Mine filter shows "Show all sessions" link, search shows query, Auto shows specific message instead of generic "No sessions"
item.description: Contextual empty session list messages — Mine filter shows "Show all sessions" link, search shows query, Auto shows specific message instead of generic "No sessions"

item.title: Conditional mobile header padding — messages top padding (56px) only applied when session header is visible via body.has-mobile-header class, prevents unnecessary gap on empty state
item.description: Conditional mobile header padding — messages top padding (56px) only applied when session header is visible via body.has-mobile-header class, prevents unnecessary gap on empty state

item.title: Hide SSE status/event-id text on mobile (hidden md:inline) — saves sidebar bottom bar space on small screens
item.description: Hide SSE status/event-id text on mobile (hidden md:inline) — saves sidebar bottom bar space on small screens

item.title: Added mobile session header bar — shows current session name at top of screen on mobile (md:hidden), updates on session select/discover/new
item.description: Added mobile session header bar — shows current session name at top of screen on mobile (md:hidden), updates on session select/discover/new

item.title: Added Mine/Auto/All session filter toggle — filters autoweb sessions from sidebar, persists choice in localStorage, with gold-accent pill UI
item.description: Added Mine/Auto/All session filter toggle — filters autoweb sessions from sidebar, persists choice in localStorage, with gold-accent pill UI

item.title: Hide search keyboard shortcut hint (/) on mobile — not useful on touch devices, frees up input space
item.description: Hide search keyboard shortcut hint (/) on mobile — not useful on touch devices, frees up input space

item.title: Hide version indicator when terminal panel is open — prevents AW text from overlapping terminal content on mobile (CSS: body.terminal-open #autoweb-version-indicator display:none)
item.description: Hide version indicator when terminal panel is open — prevents AW text from overlapping terminal content on mobile (CSS: body.terminal-open #autoweb-version-indicator display:none)

item.title: Reduced mobile terminal panel height (35vh/max-height:180px, min-height:80px) to give more room to message content on small screens
item.description: Reduced mobile terminal panel height (35vh/max-height:180px, min-height:80px) to give more room to message content on small screens

item.title: Fixed grammar in tool result summary — "1 lines" now correctly shows "1 line" (singular)
item.description: Fixed grammar in tool result summary — "1 lines" now correctly shows "1 line" (singular)

item.title: Mobile markdown improvements — link word-break:break-all to prevent URL overflow, smaller headings (h1:1.2em h2:1.1em h3:1em), tighter blockquote padding on mobile
item.description: Mobile markdown improvements — link word-break:break-all to prevent URL overflow, smaller headings (h1:1.2em h2:1.1em h3:1em), tighter blockquote padding on mobile

item.title: Added max-width:100% and height:auto to markdown images — prevents image overflow on mobile viewports
item.description: Added max-width:100% and height:auto to markdown images — prevents image overflow on mobile viewports

item.title: Mobile scroll-to-bottom button — enlarged to 44px touch target and adjusted positioning for small screens
item.description: Mobile scroll-to-bottom button — enlarged to 44px touch target and adjusted positioning for small screens

item.title: Mobile suggestion buttons — stack vertically (flex-col) on small screens with 44px min-height touch targets, centered text; horizontal row on sm+ screens
item.description: Mobile suggestion buttons — stack vertically (flex-col) on small screens with 44px min-height touch targets, centered text; horizontal row on sm+ screens

item.title: Mobile code blocks — reduced padding (0.7em) and always-visible copy button (opacity 0.7) since touch devices have no hover
item.description: Mobile code blocks — reduced padding (0.7em) and always-visible copy button (opacity 0.7) since touch devices have no hover

item.title: Mobile-friendly load earlier messages button — 44px min-height touch target, full width on small screens, tap wording
item.description: Mobile-friendly load earlier messages button — 44px min-height touch target, full width on small screens, tap wording

item.title: Mobile interrupt button now shows compact stop icon instead of "Interrupt" text — saves horizontal space in input toolbar on small screens
item.description: Mobile interrupt button now shows compact stop icon instead of "Interrupt" text — saves horizontal space in input toolbar on small screens

item.title: Deeper duplicate message fix — added text-only hash dedup (seenTextHashes/renderedTextHashes) to catch same user text appearing with and without image attachments across initial load and SSE tailing
item.description: Deeper duplicate message fix — added text-only hash dedup (seenTextHashes/renderedTextHashes) to catch same user text appearing with and without image attachments across initial load and SSE tailing

item.title: Added command XML tags (local-command-stdout, command-message, command-args) to stripSystemTags — fixes failing test-strip-command-xml-tags test
item.description: Added command XML tags (local-command-stdout, command-message, command-args) to stripSystemTags — fixes failing test-strip-command-xml-tags test

item.title: Fixed main content overflow when terminal is open — changed flex:none to flex:1 so main respects sidebar width instead of expanding to full viewport (1554px→992px)
item.description: Fixed main content overflow when terminal is open — changed flex:none to flex:1 so main respects sidebar width instead of expanding to full viewport (1554px→992px)

item.title: Compacted mobile nav pills (11px font, 32px min-width, 28px right padding) so all pills including AW are visible without scrolling on iPhone SE
item.description: Compacted mobile nav pills (11px font, 32px min-width, 28px right padding) so all pills including AW are visible without scrolling on iPhone SE

item.title: Fixed AW dashboard table on mobile — added overflow-x:auto and min-width:600px so description column is no longer truncated, table scrolls horizontally
item.description: Fixed AW dashboard table on mobile — added overflow-x:auto and min-width:600px so description column is no longer truncated, table scrolls horizontally

item.title: Fixed version indicator — now shows ET timezone (America/New_York) in compact "AW 4:26 PM ET • 19 fixes" format, with white-space:nowrap and right:8px to prevent text overflow/truncation
item.description: Fixed version indicator — now shows ET timezone (America/New_York) in compact "AW 4:26 PM ET • 19 fixes" format, with white-space:nowrap and right:8px to prevent text overflow/truncation

item.title: Added mobile touch targets (44px min-height) for nav pills and scroll fade indicator on sidebar nav bar — fixed 2 failing tests
item.description: Added mobile touch targets (44px min-height) for nav pills and scroll fade indicator on sidebar nav bar — fixed 2 failing tests

item.title: Fixed mobile input toolbar overflow — hid status text on small screens (hidden sm:inline), reduced Send/Interrupt button padding, added overflow-hidden to toolbar container
item.description: Fixed mobile input toolbar overflow — hid status text on small screens (hidden sm:inline), reduced Send/Interrupt button padding, added overflow-hidden to toolbar container

item.title: Fixed failing test-sidebar-bottom-bar-no-wrap — removed redundant inline style="flex-wrap:nowrap!important" since flex-nowrap class already handles it
item.description: Fixed failing test-sidebar-bottom-bar-no-wrap — removed redundant inline style="flex-wrap:nowrap!important" since flex-nowrap class already handles it

item.title: Fixed mobile sidebar width — changed from 85vw/280px to 100vw so sidebar covers full screen instead of showing content bleeding through on the right
item.description: Fixed mobile sidebar width — changed from 85vw/280px to 100vw so sidebar covers full screen instead of showing content bleeding through on the right

item.title: Fixed mobile sidebar header overlap — added left padding (pl-14) so Feather title no longer hidden behind hamburger menu button
item.description: Fixed mobile sidebar header overlap — added left padding (pl-14) so Feather title no longer hidden behind hamburger menu button

item.title: Added keyboard shortcuts help modal — press "?" to see all shortcuts (/, Ctrl+K, Ctrl+`, Esc), dismissible with Escape or click-outside
item.description: Added keyboard shortcuts help modal — press "?" to see all shortcuts (/, Ctrl+K, Ctrl+`, Esc), dismissible with Escape or click-outside

item.title: Escape key in chat input now also blurs the field — keyboard shortcuts like "/" work immediately after pressing Escape instead of requiring a click elsewhere
item.description: Escape key in chat input now also blurs the field — keyboard shortcuts like "/" work immediately after pressing Escape instead of requiring a click elsewhere

item.title: Added title tooltip to session items — hovering truncated session names now shows full title
item.description: Added title tooltip to session items — hovering truncated session names now shows full title

item.title: Fixed flex overflow containment — added min-w-0 to message-container and tool-header elements to prevent horizontal overflow in nested flex layouts (fixed failing test-message-overflow)
item.description: Fixed flex overflow containment — added min-w-0 to message-container and tool-header elements to prevent horizontal overflow in nested flex layouts (fixed failing test-message-overflow)

item.title: Fixed version indicator to dynamically read iter/keeps from HTML comment instead of hardcoded "3 improvements" — now shows correct count (9)
item.description: Fixed version indicator to dynamically read iter/keeps from HTML comment instead of hardcoded "3 improvements" — now shows correct count (9)

item.title: Fixed Edit tool diff rendering — proper line-by-line diff with red/green background lines instead of truncated line-through text (fixed failing test-edit-diff-view)
item.description: Fixed Edit tool diff rendering — proper line-by-line diff with red/green background lines instead of truncated line-through text (fixed failing test-edit-diff-view)

item.title: Removed redundant filename link below image previews in addUserMessageWithImage — images now show inline preview only, not both preview AND filename text
item.description: Removed redundant filename link below image previews in addUserMessageWithImage — images now show inline preview only, not both preview AND filename text

item.title: Fixed duplicate messages bug — added UUID-based deduplication in renderMessages to prevent same message rendering twice when backend JSONL contains duplicate records
item.description: Fixed duplicate messages bug — added UUID-based deduplication in renderMessages to prevent same message rendering twice when backend JSONL contains duplicate records

item.title: Added Autoweb Dashboard button (AW) in sidebar — opens full-screen modal with live results.tsv table, color-coded status badges, and iteration stats
item.description: Added Autoweb Dashboard button (AW) in sidebar — opens full-screen modal with live results.tsv table, color-coded status badges, and iteration stats

item.title: Added responsive table CSS — tables now horizontally scroll on mobile instead of wrapping into vertical spaghetti, with proper styling (borders, alternating rows, sticky headers, min-width per cell)
item.description: Added responsive table CSS — tables now horizontally scroll on mobile instead of wrapping into vertical spaghetti, with proper styling (borders, alternating rows, sticky headers, min-width per cell)

item.title: Fixed CRITICAL long message truncation — messages >500 chars now sent via WebSocket (PTY direct write) instead of tmux send-keys, with bracketed paste for multi-line support
item.description: Fixed CRITICAL long message truncation — messages >500 chars now sent via WebSocket (PTY direct write) instead of tmux send-keys, with bracketed paste for multi-line support

item.title: Added autoweb version indicator in bottom-right corner (fixed, 10px, opacity 0.3) with HTML comment tag
item.description: Added autoweb version indicator in bottom-right corner (fixed, 10px, opacity 0.3) with HTML comment tag

item.title: Added "/" keyboard shortcut to focus session search + visible kbd hint badge in search input
item.description: Added "/" keyboard shortcut to focus session search + visible kbd hint badge in search input

item.title: Increased textarea auto-resize max height from 200px to 300px — long messages now more visible before sending
item.description: Increased textarea auto-resize max height from 200px to 300px — long messages now more visible before sending
